name: Dextrum
summary: Dextrum keeps its immutable brand anchors while using supporting charcoal and gray neutrals for a calm governance workspace. Dark is the default; Light is a plain cool-neutral canvas.

darkBlue.use: Light text and structural brand surfaces

oceanBlue.use: Dark primary actions, links, focus, and current navigation

oceanDeep.use: Light primary and Dark primary active

logoTeal.use: Logo and explicit brand expression only

marketingSales.use: Explicit marketing and sales surfaces only

appWebsite.use: Product UI, dashboards, documentation, evidence identifiers, and long-form web reading

typography.arabicDisplayRule: Use Arabic display scale and IBM Plex Sans Arabic. Do not apply Latin negative tracking rules to Arabic.
typography.rationale: Manrope optimizes dense product UI; Satoshi supports labels; JetBrains Mono identifies evidence and records; Clash Grotesk remains marketing-only.

geometry.elevation: Thin semantic borders establish hierarchy; shadows are reserved for floating layers.

governanceStatus.rule: Status colors communicate governance state only; never use them as decorative accents.

allow: plain cool-neutral light canvases with white cards
Ocean Blue for Dark primary actions, links, current location, and focus
Ocean Deep for accessible Light primary actions and focus
Logo Teal only for the logo and explicit brand expression
Manrope for product UI and long reading
avoid: marketing display fonts in dense application UI

iconPolicy.description: Dextrum uses standard Lucide icons in product UI and keeps the Dextrum mark for brand surfaces.
avoid: mixed icon families in one surface
iconPolicy.coreNote: Icon policy is theme-owned. Core components remain icon-system neutral.

ar.summary: ثيم Dextrum هو مساحة حوكمة محايدة بالفحمي، مع الوضع الداكن افتراضيا ووضع فاتح بسيط. يقتصر الأزرق المعدني على الإجراءات والروابط والتركيز.

iconPolicy.description: يستخدم Dextrum أيقونات Lucide القياسية داخل واجهة المنتج، مع إبقاء علامة Dextrum لأسطح العلامة.

aiRules: Read this theme policy after the core semantic contract.
Default Dextrum to Dark; support explicit Light and system preference.
Map Dextrum primitives through semantic tokens only.
Keep Dark Blue, Ocean Blue, Ocean Deep, Logo Teal, and Timid White immutable.
Use Ocean Blue for Dark primary actions, links, current location, and focus, never as a page wash.
Use Ocean Deep for accessible Light primary actions and focus.
Use Logo Teal only for the logo and explicit brand expression.
Use governance colors only for success, warning, and critical state.
Do not override core layout tokens such as --sidebar-width-collapsed in products.
Use Manrope for Latin app UI, Satoshi for supporting labels, and JetBrains Mono for evidence identifiers.
Use Clash Grotesk for explicit marketing display only.
Keep Arabic on IBM Plex Sans Arabic tokens.
Do not import Utopia brand primitives into Dextrum-themed surfaces.
